title: Terraspread - Spread Biomes
description: Spread biomes across biome borders with a new craftable item
body:
# About
Adds a new, craftable item, Terraspread, that spreads biomes across biome borders. While holding Terraspread, right click grass/dirt on the border of a biome and the biome will spread to the neareset adjacent biome.


- **Terraspread:** Spreads a biomes border into another
  
- **Terrascrub:** Restores an area back into its original biome before Terraspread usage

Sneaking while using either item will make it place precisely where the player aims rather than adjacently.


# Recipes
**Note:** Any sapling/any bundle variant can be used

*Terraspread*

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f24b8ca2ba8ca738f1933be307e6087097dd6dd7.png)
***
*Terrascrub*

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64163959542557e281f9823e48a9bb369928db2a.png)

# Compatibility

Currently compatible with Terralith and Blooming Biosphere. Note that for this compatibility, errors may appear in your server console, but features are working correctly.

# Restrictions
Certain biomes cannot be spread nor overriden. See the list below.

<details>
  <summary>See List (Disabled by Default)</summary>
  
```
    "mushroom_fields",
    "deep_dark",
    
    "beach",
    "stony_shore",
    
    "warm_ocean",
    "cold_ocean",
    "ocean",
    "lukewarm_ocean",
    "frozen_ocean",

    "deep_cold_ocean",
    "deep_frozen_ocean",
    "deep_lukewarm_ocean",
    "deep_ocean",

    
    "blooming_biosphere:tidepools",

    
    "terralith:deep_warm_ocean",

    "terralith:skylands_autumn",
    "terralith:skylands_spring",
    "terralith:skylands_summer",
    "terralith:skylands_winter"
    
```
    
</details>

# Grief Prevention

You can disable use of these items in a region by summoning a marker with the tag `terraspread_protected` or `world_protected`, creating a protected region with a radius of 256 blocks from the marker
- Command: `/summon marker ~ ~ ~ {Tags:["world_protected"]}`

biome spreader!
